calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:50am
Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brent, clerk Jean Kong, D525,not reported.
Cause called for Small claims Appeal. Appellant, Jayme Crawford appears wih counsel Jenny D. Smith and witness Paul Downer; respondent, Mary H. McNeill as pro per; Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Brent.

APPELLANT'S BRIEF SUBMITTED IN OPEN COURT. COUNSEL EXAMINE HER CLIENT JAYME CRAWFORD.
APPELLANT'S COUNSEL EXAMINE WITNESS PAUL DOWNER.

EXHA VARIOUS DOC.
EXHA COPY OF E-MAIL
EXHA SALES REPAIR EXPENSE
EXHA LIST OF COST FOR REPAIRS
EXHA E-MAIL JULY 25,2013
EXHA RESPONSE OF THE CRAIG LIST PRICING
EXHA LIST OF CANNIDATES TO RENT TO
EXHA PICTURES 17A-D
EXHA E-MAIL ISSUE ON LAST MONTH RENT
EXHA E-MAIL ISSUE ON SECURITY DEPOSIT
EXHA E-MAIL (10/30)REGARDING FLOOR/DAMAGE OF UNIT
EXHA PHOTOS SENT BY MARY, RESPONDENT 20A-I

EXHR VARIOUS EXHIBITS
EXHR PICTURES
EXHR DOCUMENTS FROM OTHER TENANTS
EXHR DOCUMENTATION FROM APPELLANT'S ROOMMATE
EXHR DAMAGES OF WOOD FLOOR
EXHR COPY OF POSTING FOR RENT AFTER APPELLANT MOVE OUT
EXHR VARIOUS INVOICES OF REPAIRS

12:03pm
Appellant's Counsel request recess for 5 minutes, Judge granted the recess till 12:10pm.
12:10pm
case resume, all parties present.

Appellant's counsel cross-exmines the respondent, McNeill.
EXHA June correspondences the refridgerator is not repair
EXHA AUGUST E-MAIL

12:40PM
Respondent request for recess, 10 minutes recess.
12:47pm
case resume, all parties present.

appellant, Ms. McNeill cross-examine respondent, Ms. Crawford.
closing arguments from both side.

1:15pm
Matter is submitted. Newly evidence retained.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
